title: Currently open connections are NOT viewable in "one single/collective area".
author: fhousen
body_snippet:
<!--
Only file GitHub issues for bugs and feature requests.  All other topics will be closed.

Before opening an issue, please search for a duplicate or closed issue.
Please provide as much detail as possible for us to fix your issue.
-->
Please add the ability to view ALL currently "Open Sessions" (connections that are running) directly under the "Connections" icon so that you don't have to search through all of the various folders that you've created to gracefully log out of servers or e...

iterations.description: The issue title suggests wanting a consolidated view of open connections but the body is empty with no details on what specific UI change is requested or how it differs from existing panel/tab functionality

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage: The issue title suggests wanting a consolidated view of open connections but the body is empty with no details on what specific UI change is requested or how it differs from existing panel/tab functionality
Approach: Need clarification from reporter on what 'one single/collective area' means - could be a dashboard panel showing all active connections, a status bar summary, or something else entirely
